_comment: Current model outputs (v5 after Opus Sprint 1-2 fixes). Source: ProjectInputs.create_default_oborovo() + cached_run_waterfall_v3. NOT Excel-verified — model calibration needed.

metadata.note: These are the current model outputs after Opus Sprint 1-2 fixes. Deviations from Excel targets are documented. Regression tests use CURRENT outputs as baseline until model is re-calibrated.

note: This fixture captures the CURRENT state of the model. Excel-verified targets are in oborovo_baseline.json. The model currently deviates from Excel in several areas — see deviations map.

excel_targets.note: These are the Excel-verified golden numbers from Oborovo Excel model.

deviations.summary: Model computes lower debt (37M vs 42.8M EUR), higher project IRR (8.84% vs 8.42%), lower equity IRR (9.36% vs 11.0%). Likely causes: (1) EPC profile or capex timing differences; (2) different depreciation schedule; (3) tax loss treatment; (4) cash sweep calibration.

tolerances._comment: Tolerances for regression testing. Currently RELAXED because model needs calibration. Target: IRR < 1 bps (0.01%), NPV < 1%.
